data.title: GH Research Publishes Phase 2b GH001 TRD Data and Highlights Severity-Independent Efficacy
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from GH Research ( (GHRS) ) is now available.

On March 25, 2026, GH Research PLC reported that full results from its randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled Phase 2b trial of mebufotenin (GH001) in treatment-resistant depression have been published and peer-reviewed in JAMA Psychiatry. The article details primary and secondary efficacy outcomes, safety and tolerability, and six‑month open‑label extension data, providing a key validation milestone for the program.

The company also disclosed that a supporting manuscript has been accepted for publication in Psychopharmacology Bulletin, showing GH001’s efficacy does not diminish with increasing numbers of prior antidepressant treatment failures. This severity‑independent effect contrasts with the well-known decline in remission rates seen in legacy trials such as STAR*D, reinforcing GH001’s potential to address heavily pretreated TRD patients and underpinning GH Research’s push toward global pivotal trials.

The most recent analyst rating on (GHRS) stock is a Hold with a $13.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on GH Research stock, see the GHRS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GHRS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GHRS is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by pre-revenue financials with widening losses and continued cash burn, partially offset by a very low-leverage balance sheet. Technicals are neutral-to-mildly supportive (price above longer-term averages with neutral momentum), while valuation is constrained by negative earnings and no dividend data.

To see Spark’s full report on GHRS stock, click here.

More about GH Research

GH Research PLC is a Dublin-based, clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing novel mebufotenin-based therapies for treatment-resistant depression (TRD). Its lead candidate, GH001, is an inhaled formulation designed to deliver rapid antidepressant effects, with the company targeting a practice-changing role in the TRD treatment landscape.

Average Trading Volume: 373,467

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $819.4M

data.title: Bluerock Homes Trust Updates S-11 With 2025 Governance
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Bluerock Homes Trust, Inc. Class A ( (BHM) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Bluerock Homes Trust updated its effective S-11 registration on March 12, 2026 to incorporate audited 2025 financial statements, governance details and Part III disclosures from its upcoming 2026 proxy, and outlined a stable leadership slate led by founder and CEO R. Ramin Kamfar with a board that is 20% female and 80% ethnically diverse. The filing details the company’s board committees, director compensation, equity incentive capacity, related-party management and DST program fee flows, and significant insider and 5% shareholder ownership, giving investors clearer visibility into how management is paid, how capital is allocated through affiliates, and how governance and compliance structures operated through year-end 2025.

The company reported $10.5 million of base management fees and $4.0 million of operating expense reimbursements to its external manager for 2025, plus growing DST acquisition and asset management fees and a series of cost-sharing and joint-venture arrangements with manager affiliates. It also disclosed extensive stock ownership guidelines, anti-hedging and pledging controls, a clawback policy for incentive fees, and full compliance with Section 16 filings, while confirming Grant Thornton LLP’s continued role as auditor with $674,000 in 2025 audit fees and no incentive fees paid to the manager for 2024–2025.

The most recent analyst rating on (BHM) stock is a Buy with a $13.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Bluerock Homes Trust, Inc. Class A stock, see the BHM Stock Forecast page.

More about Bluerock Homes Trust, Inc. Class A

Bluerock Homes Trust, Inc. is an externally managed real estate investment trust focused on residential properties, including multifamily and build-to-rent communities, primarily in the United States. The company operates through an affiliated manager and related entities, leverages a Delaware statutory trust (DST) program and joint ventures, and uses equity incentive plans to align management and director interests with shareholders.

data.title: Aegon Nominates Marco Keim to Represent Its Stake on a.s.r. Supervisory Board
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Aegon ( (AEG) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 25, 2026, Aegon announced the nomination of Marco Keim, CEO of its International business and Executive Committee member, to succeed Aegon CEO Lard Friese as a non-independent member of the Supervisory Board of Dutch insurer a.s.r., in which Aegon holds a roughly 24% strategic stake. The change follows Aegon’s December 10, 2025 disclosure that Friese would step down from the a.s.r. board to focus on relocating Aegon’s head office and legal seat to the U.S., with Keim’s appointment to be voted on at a.s.r.’s AGM on May 20, 2026 and, if approved, running until July 4, 2028.

The nomination underscores Aegon’s intent to maintain strong oversight and influence over its sizeable a.s.r. holding while freeing Friese to concentrate on the complex U.S. relocation, a key strategic shift for the group. Keim’s extensive leadership background in Dutch insurance, including his tenure as CEO of Aegon the Netherlands and prior role at Zwitserleven, positions him to safeguard Aegon’s interests at a.s.r., providing continuity for shareholders and signaling continued commitment to the Dutch market despite the corporate redomiciling.

The most recent analyst rating on (AEG) stock is a Buy with a $9.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Aegon stock, see the AEG Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AEG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AEG is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by improving financial performance (return to profitability and decent cash conversion), supported by attractive valuation (low P/E and strong dividend yield). Technicals are mildly constructive with the price above key moving averages and neutral momentum indicators.

To see Spark’s full report on AEG stock, click here.

More about Aegon

Aegon is an international financial services holding company focused on providing investment, protection, and retirement solutions. Its portfolio includes fully owned businesses in the United States and United Kingdom, a global asset manager, and insurance joint ventures in Spain & Portugal, China, and Brazil, as well as asset management partnerships in France and China. Aegon also owns a Bermuda-based life insurer and holds a strategic stake in a leading Dutch insurance and pensions company, reflecting its ambition to build leading businesses while addressing environmental and societal issues.

data.title: Honda and Sony Halt AFEELA EV Launches as Honda Overhauls Electrification Strategy
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Honda Motor Company ( (HMC) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On March 25, 2026, Honda said its equity-method affiliate Sony Honda Mobility will discontinue development and launch of its first EV model AFEELA1 and a second planned model, prompting Sony, Honda and the JV to conduct a broad review of the venture’s business direction. The companies plan to reassess Sony Honda Mobility’s role and positioning in light of a changing EV market, although Honda expects any impact on its revised full-year earnings forecast for the year ending March 31, 2026 to be immaterial.

The March 25 announcement follows Honda’s March 12, 2026 decision to cancel certain EV models slated for North American production, as part of a wider reassessment of its automobile electrification strategy. In response to slowing EV demand in North America, shifting U.S. policy, and intensifying software-driven competition in China and Asia, Honda now expects to book substantial impairment and related losses on EV-focused assets and some equity-method investments in China for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2026.

The most recent analyst rating on (HMC) stock is a Hold with a $26.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Honda Motor Company stock, see the HMC Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on HMC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, HMC is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weakened cash-flow trends and soft technical momentum (price below key moving averages with negative MACD). These are partly offset by an attractive valuation (moderate P/E and high dividend yield) and an earnings-call backdrop that maintains guidance and emphasizes liquidity and motorcycle strength, despite significant auto/EV and tariff-related headwinds.

To see Spark’s full report on HMC stock, click here.

More about Honda Motor Company

Honda Motor Co., Ltd. is a global automotive and motorcycle manufacturer based in Tokyo, operating across automobiles, motorcycles and financial services. The company has pursued long-term carbon neutrality with a strong legacy in internal combustion and hybrid vehicles, while expanding into electric vehicles and advanced mobility solutions through in-house programs and partnerships such as Sony Honda Mobility Inc.

data.title: Tower Semiconductor, Nuvoton to Restructure TPSCo Fabs in Japan
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Tower ( (TSEM) ) is now available.

On March 25, 2026, Tower Semiconductor and Nuvoton Technology Corporation Japan agreed to a strategic restructuring of their joint venture Tower Partners Semiconductor Co. (TPSCo), which operates 12‑inch and 8‑inch fabs in Japan. Under the framework agreement, Tower will assume full ownership and operational control of TPSCo’s 12‑inch fabrication facility and related foundry business in Uozu, while TPSCo’s 8‑inch fab in Tonami will stay within TPSCo, which will become a wholly owned Nuvoton subsidiary.

As part of the deal, Nuvoton’s Japanese unit will pay Tower $25 million upon closing, and both sides plan to maintain uninterrupted customer engagements, development programs and employee stability at the two sites. The realignment, expected to close on April 1, 2027 subject to regulatory and customary approvals, is designed to sharpen each company’s strategic focus and bolster their competitiveness in the global semiconductor market by better aligning assets with long‑term business goals and supporting mutual production services between the facilities.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSEM) stock is a Buy with a $180.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Tower stock, see the TSEM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSEM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSEM is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by strong technical momentum and solid financial quality (especially the conservative balance sheet). Earnings-call commentary adds support via upbeat guidance and a largely pre-reserved capacity ramp, while the main offset is a stretched valuation (high P/E) alongside recent free-cash-flow weakness and execution/contract risks.

To see Spark’s full report on TSEM stock, click here.

More about Tower

Tower Semiconductor is a leading foundry of high‑value analog semiconductor solutions, providing technology platforms and development services for consumer, industrial, automotive, mobile, infrastructure, medical, and aerospace and defense markets. The company offers customizable process technologies including SiGe, BiCMOS, mixed-signal/RF CMOS, CMOS image sensors, power management, photonics, and MEMS, supported by design enablement and process transfer services across fabs in Israel, the U.S., Japan and a shared facility in Italy.

data.title: Real Messenger Explores Major U.S. Brokerage Tie-Up for Tech Platform Deployment
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Real Messenger ( (RMSG) ).

On March 25, 2026, Real Messenger Corporation announced it had signed a non-binding memorandum of understanding with a publicly traded U.S. real estate brokerage to explore deploying its integrated real estate technology platform across the brokerage’s agent network. The evaluation will cover CRM tools, messaging and communication systems, listing and transaction management software, lead generation capabilities, and analytics, but any broad rollout would depend on negotiating and executing a definitive commercial licensing and services agreement, and there is no assurance one will be reached.

If ultimately implemented, the contemplated collaboration could significantly expand Real Messenger’s technology footprint within the traditional brokerage channel, deepening its integration into everyday agent workflows and potentially reinforcing its positioning in the competitive proptech and real estate engagement space. However, the exploratory and non-binding nature of the MOU underscores the early stage of discussions and leaves operational and financial impacts for Real Messenger and the brokerage’s stakeholders uncertain at this time.

More about Real Messenger

Real Messenger Corporation (Nasdaq: RMSG) is a Costa Mesa, California-based real estate technology platform founded in 2022 that connects agents, buyers, sellers, and other industry participants through a unified, social, chat-based application. The company focuses primarily on the U.S. market but serves users in 35 countries, has surpassed 1 million users, and has received industry recognition from HousingWire and Inman for its proptech innovation.

data.title: Viomi Technology Posts 2025 Results, Declares Special Dividend as Global Water Push Accelerates
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Viomi Technology Co ( (VIOT) ) is now available.

On March 25, 2026, Viomi reported unaudited results for the second half and full year 2025, showing second-half net revenue down 25.9% to RMB950.6 million and net income to ordinary shareholders down 70.2% to RMB21.2 million, mainly due to reduced Chinese subsidies and softer home water system demand. For full year 2025, however, revenue from continuing operations rose 14.6% to RMB2,428.2 million while net income eased only 1.9% to RMB141.6 million, as Viomi sharpened its focus on water solutions after divesting most IoT@Home assets and declared a special cash dividend to return capital to shareholders.

Management highlighted the momentum of its “Global Water” strategy, with strong sequential sales growth via Amazon in North America, tailored product launches and brand-building in Southeast Asia, and accelerated AI- and health-focused innovation. The company ramped up its overseas “Water Purifier Gigafactory,” with a premium production line supporting instant heating, cooling, and ice-making features for Western and Asian markets, and plans to leverage its expanding patent base and global certifications to strengthen competitiveness and scale in 2026 despite near-term margin and subsidy headwinds.

The most recent analyst rating on (VIOT) stock is a Hold with a $1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Viomi Technology Co stock, see the VIOT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on VIOT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, VIOT is a Neutral.

The score is primarily supported by improving fundamentals (revenue growth and better operating margins) and a strong balance sheet with low leverage, plus attractive valuation (low P/E and high yield). These positives are tempered by very weak technicals (downtrend and negative momentum) and lingering profitability/cash-conversion concerns (thin net margin and cash flow ratios at 0).

To see Spark’s full report on VIOT stock, click here.

More about Viomi Technology Co

Viomi Technology Co., Ltd. is a Chinese technology company focused on home water solutions, including water purifiers, dispensers, and related appliances, with a growing international footprint in North America, Southeast Asia, and Europe. Following an August 2024 divestment of most IoT@Home products, Viomi has repositioned itself as a specialized, AI-enhanced water technology player targeting health-oriented consumers and premium overseas channels.

data.title: Cognyte Delivers Strong Fiscal 2026 Results and Lifts Outlook for 2027
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Cognyte Software ( (CGNT) ).

On March 25, 2026, Cognyte Software reported strong results for its fourth quarter and fiscal year ended January 31, 2026, highlighted by double-digit revenue growth and sharply improved profitability. Quarterly revenue rose 12.4% to $106.2 million with GAAP net income of $5.1 million, while full-year revenue climbed 14.1% to $400 million and GAAP net income swung to a $4.6 million profit from a loss a year earlier.

Non-GAAP operating income more than doubled to $36.7 million for the year, Adjusted EBITDA jumped 66% to $48.2 million, and non-GAAP gross margin expanded to 73%, reflecting scale and operational efficiencies. The company ended the quarter with $116.9 million in cash and no debt, continued to execute on its share repurchase programs with $26.7 million cumulatively bought back since November 2024, and guided for fiscal 2027 revenue of about $448 million and roughly 40% Adjusted EBITDA growth, underscoring management’s confidence and solid visibility from growing backlog and remaining performance obligations.

The most recent analyst rating on (CGNT) stock is a Buy with a $13.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cognyte Software stock, see the CGNT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CGNT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CGNT is a Neutral.

The score is supported by improving fundamentals and strong cash generation with low leverage, reinforced by a positive earnings update that included margin expansion and raised full-year guidance. data.title: Execution Risks Cloud Achieve Life Sciences’ Commercial Plans for Cytisinicline
data.description:
Achieve Life Sciences (ACHV) has disclosed a new risk, in the Sales & Marketing category.

Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Achieve Life Sciences faces significant execution risk in commercializing cytisinicline, as success depends on rapidly building or outsourcing distribution, marketing, and sales capabilities it does not yet possess. Reliance on third parties, including its Omnicom partnership that requires pre‑approval spending, could lead to cost overruns, disputes, or launch disruption if approvals are delayed or denied.

The company’s ability to recruit and retain commercial talent, secure physician adoption, obtain favorable reimbursement, and access effective distribution channels remains uncertain and could limit market penetration even if cytisinicline is approved. Limited product breadth and unforeseen commercialization costs may further weaken its competitive position, particularly outside the United States where dependence on foreign partners reduces its control over sales execution.

Guardian Pharmacy Services’ stock action over the last day centered on its upsized underwritten offering and related governance changes. The company priced a 6M‑share Class A offering at $31 in a largely non‑dilutive synthetic secondary, using proceeds from newly issued shares to repurchase an equal amount, while former controlling holders lost majority voting power, pushing Guardian into full NYSE governance compliance.
